f0c03ddd3395d724: A flexible platform for any data workflow
a0101f5efd780b4d: Stop switching between different tools for surveys, feedback forms, and product analytics. Trackables unifies everything using a consistent collection model.
1b7e71a2f49420eb: Easily capture ratings, booleans, unstructured text, and more from customizable public forms.
9902a741dea62498: Integrate deeply into your application to log background events and track granular product usage.
b067c940acb635ad: Instantly view all historical submissions and raw usage counts without managing fragmented dashboards.

17505cfb331201d3: This Privacy Statement explains how Trackables collects, uses, and stores information when you use the service.

a246502f249d4e86: We do not sell personal information. We may share information with service providers that help us operate the platform, when required by law, or when necessary to protect rights, safety, and the integrity of the service.
ec5c071fd3665430: We retain information for as long as necessary to operate the service, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
aa3e38c5a9ef6ef3: We use reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational measures to protect information, but no method of transmission or storage is completely secure.
e336bd6bd58550f2: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your information where applicable. You may also stop using the service at any time.
fab19524c22bcd5c: The service is not intended for children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
b5aac47926f63bdd: We may update this Privacy Statement from time to time. Continued use of the service after an update becomes effective constitutes acceptance of the revised statement.
1e8c3134599dabf8: If you have questions about this Privacy Statement, contact the service operator.
